ranked_matches.title: UEFA Champions League: Sporting vs Bodø/Glimt

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I concluded with New Zealand winning by 68 runs to level the series 1-1. Several major European and domestic football fixtures are scheduled for later today, including UEFA Champions League and EFL Championship matches.
